utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God ! How did you get back here ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Fire alarm ? Oh ! Hi , officer ... fireman , can ... can I help you ?

utterances.speaker: The Fireman
utterances.text: We found your fire alarm in the trash chute .

emotion_cause.span: 3_We found your fire alarm in the trash chute .

utterances.speaker: The Fireman
utterances.text: The next time you want to dump a fire alarm in a trash chute , do not wrap it in a blanket that says , " Property of Phoebe Buffay not Monica . "

emotion_cause.span: 7_The next time you want to dump a fire alarm in a trash chute , do not wrap it in a blanket that says , " Property of Phoebe Buffay not Monica . "

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay do you ... Okay , do you have a search warrant ? Because the last time I checked this was still America !

emotion_cause.span: 7_The next time you want to dump a fire alarm in a trash chute , do not wrap it in a blanket that says , " Property of Phoebe Buffay not Monica . "

utterances.speaker: The Fireman
utterances.text: Please reattach this , it is against the law to disconnect them .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Fine ! But please God ... tell me how to stop them from going off !

emotion_cause.span: 10_how to stop them from going off !

utterances.speaker: The Fireman
utterances.text: There is a reset button under the plastic cover .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Why did not I see that !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Reset button , reset button , where is there a reset button ?
